description: This is a contemporary cricket shoe made for the all-round cricketer. The lightweight construction and the breathable mesh uppers make this shoe a delight to wear. It's primed to perform on any surface and the style quotient is enhanced with high visibility cosmetics.Upper Lightweight microfibre with breathable mesh panels perforated toe box detail Abrasion resistant toe overlay Padded heel for traction Integrated lace-wrap stability support system High visibility cosmetics Midsole Compression moulded EVA with idCELL heel unit and ArchTec stability shank Soft EVA innerboard and padded sockliner Outsole Rubber spikes for grip on uneven terrain and smooth running gait
